jobs.title: Fellow (Cardiology)
jobs.description:
Aufgaben:
âĒ Participate in patient recruitment for international multicentre trials, contribute to outpatient clinics, and gain increasing responsibility in the cath lab during valve procedures (TAVI, TEER, TMVR, etc.), based on technical competence

âĒ Spend one day per week in the cath lab, gaining direct involvement in structural heart interventions. Fellows will learn advanced techniques such as pre-procedural CT analysis using dedicated software

âĒ Join Heart Team meetings three times per week, participate in clinical rounds and journal clubs, and contribute to patient management decisions at a consultant level.

âĒ Engage in clinical research within the Cardiovascular Research Institute Basel (CRIB). Fellows will receive mentorship in study design, data collection, analysis, manuscript preparation, and publication

âĒ While not mandatory, fellows may opt to participate in on-call duties to gain additional experience in emergency situations

Anforderungen:
âĒ Completion of core training in Internal Medicine and General Cardiology

âĒ Basic skills in coronary angiography and interventional procedures

âĒ Proficiency in English and German (mandatory); knowledge of French is an asset

âĒ A medical license recognized by the Swiss Federal Office of Public Health (required for clinical duties)

âĒ Candidates must be prepared to contribute to patient care at a consultant level in the cath lab

âĒ Candidates should be highly motivated to engage in both clinical and research activities within the field of structural heart disease

Wir bieten:
âĒ Attractive salary policy and exceptional social benefits

âĒ Discounts for shopping, sport and recreation

âĒ Support during relocation and apartment hunting

âĒ 25 vacation days, plus 5 flexible free days

âĒ Support in further training and education, plus career planning

âĒ Campus in the heart of Basel and the tri-border region

âĒ Comprehensive childcare options

âĒ Free-of-charge sport and fitness program
